opinion.h: MAYER v. RUSK, SECRETARY OF STATE. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES DISTRICT COURT FOR THE DISTRICT OF COLUMBIA. No. 746. Decided June 22, 1964.
opinion.p: David Carliner, Francis Heisler, Oliver Stone and Jack Wasserman for appellant.
The judgment is vacated and the case is remanded to the District Court for consideration in light of Aptheker v. Secretary of State, ante, p. 500.
MR. JUSTICE CLARK, MR. JUSTICE HARLAN and MR. JUSTICE WHITE would affirm the judgment.
